title: Just more fps
description: A Pojav Launcher modpack that aims on getting more fps rather than faster chunk generation
body:
A modpack designed for Pojav Launcher Glow-worm on low end phones to just focus on playable framerates.

Please use the newest Pojav [Glow-worm](https://github.com/Vera-Firefly/Pojav-Glow-Worm/) version with the LTW Renderer!

The gl4es version of my modpack also works with normal Pojavlauncher but the LTW version does work with sodium and is better.
